name: Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped dried figs, dates, prunes, crushed pineapple, dark raisins, chopped apple, and chopped walnuts.
2. Add orange juice to the fruit mixture and stir until well combined.
3. In another bowl, whisk together whole wheat flour, baking powder, baking soda, ground cinnamon, and ground nutmeg.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the fruit mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into a lightly oiled 10-inch tube pan.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 40 to 50 minutes.
7. Allow the cake to cool before serving.
